_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of engineering concepts as applied to computer architecture and associated computer hardware/software.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data product design principles, including data product definition, consumer segmentation, interface design (APIs, subscriptions, files), SLA definition, and data product lifecycle.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-014 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-K-005 (LS, cosine: 0.470), DA-K-002 (DA, cosine: 0.453).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.460). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [applied, architecture, associated, computer, concepts, engineering] vs WIDAI-only terms [apis, consumer, data, definition, design, files] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.881, R=0.852). P exceeds R by 0.029 — the DCWF element's 13 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.2%, N:67.1%, C:32.7%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of engineering concepts as applied to computer architecture and associ" vs "Knowledge of data product design principles, including data product definition," — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.479 ≈ STS 0.460 (gap 0.019). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [applied, architecture, associated, computer, concepts, engineering]. WIDAI-only: [apis, consumer, data, definition, design, files].
